evidence: XPENDING stream:opportunities coordinator-group shows 28,448 pending messages. stream_pending{stream=opportunities}=28,448. stream_health_status{stream=opportunities}=0 (CRITICAL)
actual: 28,448 pending messages — coordinator severely overwhelmed by 130+ opps/s detection rate in high realism simulation
recommendation: 1) For simulation: increase simulationTtlMultiplier to 10x. 2) For production: implement coordinator batch processing (OPT-1 batch handler) to consume opportunities in bulk. 3) Consider horizontal scaling of coordinator or increasing WORKER_POOL_SIZE.

evidence: DLQ length=166 (growing ~2/s). All entries are [VAL_EXPIRED] — opportunities expired 6-9s before execution-engine processes them. Example: opportunityId multi_ethereum_1772455507357 expired 9428ms ago.
expected: DLQ should be near-0 in healthy pipeline
actual: 166 DLQ entries accumulated from expired opportunities. Root cause: coordinator lag means opportunities expire in-transit.
recommendation: Same as RT-001. Also: execution-engine could ACK and silently discard expired opportunities instead of routing to DLQ — expiration is a normal pipeline signal, not an error requiring DLQ forensics.

evidence: All 7 services report status=healthy. Coordinator systemHealth=100, all partitions 4+5+3+1=13 chains healthy, execution 100% success rate (5/5).

expected: Leader elected with healthy lock TTL

evidence: Circuit breaker state=CLOSED, consecutiveFailures=0, totalSuccesses=0, totalFailures=0, timesTripped=0

expected: Risk state NORMAL in simulation mode
actual: Risk state NORMAL — correct. No drawdown, full position sizing.

evidence: P1: p50=3ms, p95=3ms, p99=3ms. P2: p50=3ms, p95=3ms, p99=3ms. P3: p50=3ms, p95=3ms, p99=3ms. P4: p50=0ms, p95=0ms, p99=0ms (Solana uses different detection pipeline).
actual: All partitions well under target. 3ms p99 is excellent.

evidence: P1=263MB, P2=91MB, P3=63MB, P4=44MB, Exec=85MB, CrossChain=133MB. Redis: 71.65MB/128MB (56%). Total service RAM ~680MB.
actual: All within dev thresholds (80% warning). P1 highest at 263MB due to 4 chains + 360+180+420+135=1095 pairs.
recommendation: P1 memory could grow further with sustained load. Monitor in long-running sessions.

evidence: executionAttempts=5, successfulExecutions=5 (100%), BUT opportunitiesReceived=130, validationErrors=119 (91.5%). Only 5/130 opportunities reach execution — rest expire before processing.
expected: Higher throughput — at least 30%+ of received opportunities should reach execution
actual: 91.5% rejection rate from validation errors (all VAL_EXPIRED). Pipeline bottleneck at coordinator.
recommendation: Increase simulationTtlMultiplier for simulation. In production, optimize coordinator batch processing throughput.

evidence: simulationsPerformed=0, simulationsSkipped=5, healthyProviders=0. All 5 executed trades skipped simulation.
expected: Simulation providers available even in dev mode (local eth_call)
actual: No simulation providers healthy. Trades execute without pre-simulation validation.
recommendation: Configure at least LOCAL simulation provider (eth_call) for dev mode validation. Currently execution proceeds without simulation — acceptable for testing but risky for production.

evidence: 12/19 streams discovered. Missing 7: service-health, service-events, coordinator-events, health-alerts, circuit-breaker, system-commands, fast-lane. All missing streams are [IDLE] or [ON-DEMAND] per lifecycle legend.
actual: 12 streams exist — all ACTIVE streams present. Missing streams are IDLE/ON-DEMAND (no producers wired yet).
recommendation: No action needed — streams created on-demand when first published to.

evidence: XPENDING stream:price-updates coordinator-group shows 54 pending messages
actual: 54 pending — slightly above threshold but not critical. Coordinator processing prices with minor lag.
recommendation: Monitor in sustained load. Could increase coordinator batch size for price-updates.
